description: Module remove scheduled — customer removed Offers from the dashboard; full access until effective date, monthly drops, no setup refund

expected.subject: Got it — Offers scheduled for 2026-06-01
expected.body:
Hi Priya,

Quick confirmation — your module change is queued.

You are REMOVING: Offers

Effective from: 2026-06-01

Where you stand on money:

  • Setup paid to date:      £197 (non-refundable)
  • Current monthly:         £29/mo
  • New monthly from 2026-06-01: £25/mo

What happens between now and then:
  • Nothing changes on your bill THIS month — you keep
    full access to Offers until 2026-06-01
    since you have already paid.
  • From 2026-06-01: your monthly drops to the new
    figure above and Offers is gone.
  • No refund for the rest of this month — you are using
    the service through to the end of it.

The setup figure above is what you have already paid to
build the site. It is not refunded under any module change
or cancellation — that work has been delivered.

Changed your mind? Just open your dashboard and remove the
pending change. Anything done by you before the effective
date is reversible from there.

— ModuForge
